creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
LibreAtlas is an open source Geography Education application built on top of SpatiaLite and RasterLite. It uses LibreAtlas databases which are a digital alternative to a paper atlas.

Need Rasterlite ports : http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/173130

WWW: https://www.gaia-gis.it/fossil/libreatlas/index

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Tinder log :
https://redports.org/buildarchive/20121027143848-37753/
